basis: Anchor 30 plan lists Meren as Golgari graveyard/sacrifice recursion.
Meren needs sacrifice outlets, ETB/death creatures and graveyard value.
Profile separates grindy recursion from generic Golgari goodstuff.

source_limit_notes: Aggregate/manual reference only; no copied public decklist.
Use sacrifice/recursion engines as core, not incidental value.
Stax/locks are bracket-aware and should not be defaulted into casual.

themes.name: graveyard_sacrifice_recursion
themes.notes: Meren converts creature deaths into repeatable recursion.

themes.name: etb_death_value
themes.notes: Creatures with ETB/death triggers become reusable answers and card advantage.

themes.name: golgari_aristocrats_control
themes.notes: Sacrifice payoffs and attrition control close long games.

examples: random big creatures without recursion text
avoid_patterns.reason: Meren needs creatures that benefit from dying/reentering.
Experience counters and recursion need repeatable deaths.
